conditions.evidence_text: The solvent composition of 85:15v/v mode for the separation of PPO, was changed to 65:35v/v tetrahydrofuran (THF)/ water, which represents the 'critical' ratio.
conditions.notes: Isocratic mode used for PPO critical condition. Two columns in series.
conditions.physical_address: Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing (BAM), Dept I 'Analytical Chemistry, Reference Materials', Richard-Willstatter-Strasse 11, D-12489 Berlin, Germany

conditions.evidence_text: The solvent composition of 85:15v/v mode for the separation of PPO, was changed to 65:35v/v tetrahydrofuran (THF)/ water, which represents the 'critical' ratio. In gradient mode 'critical' conditions of separation of PEO (THF/methanol/ water) were initially adjusted.
